description: obsidian-llm-wiki hooks — hot cache restore on session start, hot cache update on session end. NOTE: PostCompact (hot cache re-injection after context compaction) is available in the Claude Code version but has no Copilot CLI equivalent; hot cache context may be lost during automatic compaction.

Stop.bash: INPUT="$(cat)"; ACTIVE="$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | grep -o '"stop_hook_active"[^,}]*' | grep -o 'true\|false' || echo false)"; [ "$ACTIVE" = "true" ] && exit 0; VAULT="${VAULT_PATH:-${VAULT:-${HOME}/obsidian_vault}}"; [ "$(cd "$PWD" && pwd -P)" = "$(cd "$VAULT" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P)" ] || exit 0; [ -d "${VAULT}/wiki" ] || exit 0; find "${VAULT}/wiki/hot.md" -mmin -3 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && exit 0; printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Read %s/skills/wiki-hot/SKILL.md fully, then update wiki/hot.md to reflect this session. Keep total under 300 words. Preserve relevant context from previous sessions already in the file; drop what is now stale or superseded. Overwrite the file completely -- it is a rolling cache, not a journal. If nothing wiki-related happened this session, update Last Updated and note no wiki changes this session."}' "${PLUGIN_ROOT}"
